/usr/bin/ar qc libai_chat_SDK.a  CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/ChatGPTProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/ChatSDK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/DataManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/DeepSeekProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/GeminiProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/LLMManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/OllamaProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_chat_SDK.dir/src/util/myLog.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libai_chat_SDK.a
